name: Indie Hacker / Startup Stack
description: Near-zero infra overhead; AI handles 60-80% of boilerplate. The fastest path from idea to deployed SaaS.
target: MVPs, SaaS products, solo/small team full-stack web apps

name: Agentic Coding Stack
description: Full loop from task to deployed PR without human keyboard input. AI reads, writes, tests, and ships.
target: Autonomous feature development, bug fixing, refactoring

name: Enterprise RAG Stack
description: Mature, well-documented, enterprise-proven. Full RAG pipeline with observability from day one.
target: Internal knowledge bases, customer support bots, doc Q&A

name: OSS Self-Hosted AI Stack
description: Zero data egress; entirely on-premise. Full AI capabilities without sending data to external services.
target: Privacy-first orgs, enterprises with data residency requirements

name: Multi-Agent DevOps Stack
description: Specialized agents integrated into existing CI/CD. Automates code review, test generation, and PR creation.
target: Engineering teams automating repetitive dev tasks

name: AI Design-to-Code Pipeline
description: Eliminates translation cost between design and implementation. From Figma to production components.
target: Design-eng handoff, component libraries, rapid prototyping

name: LLM Startup Infrastructure Stack
description: Provider-agnostic; full observability from day one. The standard infra layer for AI-native startups.

name: MCP Power User Stack
description: MCP eliminates the need for separate AI integrations per tool. One AI interface for your entire workflow.
target: Individual power users and small teams wanting unified AI orchestration
